raw_title: Elected officials’ Online Sharing of Misinformation: Institutional and Ideological Checks
title_en: Elected officials’ Online Sharing of Misinformation: Institutional and Ideological Checks
title_zh: 民选官员在线分享错误信息：制度与意识形态制约
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了民选官员在社交媒体上分享错误信息的行为，并分析了制度和意识形态因素如何影响或制约这种行为。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how elected officials share misinformation on social media and analyzes how institutional and ideological factors influence or constrain this behavior.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中数字平台上的错误信息传播机制及其社会影响研究
research_direction_en: Research on misinformation dissemination mechanisms on digital platforms in political communication and their societal impacts
